effect: closure-only causal meaning, failure rules, and downstream obligations; no I03C rewrite, runtime rerun, scientific response, calibration, registration, R01-R05 result, mode rank, discriminator-gate pass, or I04 authority

hybrid_carrier_authority.identity: native P current-state component + authoritative active H_P + declared native M_H output-port binding + one common [P,M_H]/[B_ref] access relation to native V

components.P: native accumulated common current state; independently intervenable; read exactly once by V
components.H_P: persistent source-label-free ordered active history; independently intervenable; authoritative for history state
components.M_H: native coherence output port/cache materialized from R_H(H_P); never authoritative over H_P and never the complete pool
components.V: one native live-state feedback and producer path reading P and M_H jointly against B_ref
components.L: native packet/event/contact/lineage attribution and audit; admission/idempotency input only where declared; never a response input

prohibited_substitutes: a controller-computed P plus R_H scalar
hybrid_carrier_authority.one_pool_binding_rule: P, H_P, M_H, masks, admission profile, neutral-contact policy, and responder role are bound by one fixture/registration identity; cross-pool P/H_P pairing is invalid.
hybrid_carrier_authority.bounded_architectural_claim: The native response mechanism reads two current node values, while the hybrid ecological architecture additionally contains an independently persistent, intervenable, save/load/reset H_P whose verified output is M_H.

authoritative_history_output_rule.required_invariant: M_H equals registered_materialization(R_H(H_P)) under the conformance or later registered comparator before V
authoritative_history_output_rule.disagreement_effect: fail closed before feedback/continuation; rematerialize from H_P or reject the branch; never treat stale M_H as authoritative
authoritative_history_output_rule.claim_limit: The verified output-port relation supports hybrid architecture, not irreducible history dependence.

cells.i03c_conformance_witness: history_only_clamp demonstrates feasibility but is not a scientific cell
not executed as a full-reference runtime cell; state_only_debit demonstrates P-only intervention purity but remains nonzero P

qualitative_component_factorial.i03c_runtime_scope: independent perturbation feasibility and same-V conformance only; not a complete scientific 2x2 execution
qualitative_component_factorial.i04_i06_rule: I04 must operationalize and I06 must register all four qualitative cells with exact held-fixed rules; neither iteration may invent, delete, or infer a scientific relation from I03C fixture threshold outcomes.

continuous_joint_causality.family: J(P,H_P) = P + R_H(H_P) through native live-state mask [P,M_H]
continuous_joint_causality.required_meaning: both separately causal components contribute through the same native V
continuous_joint_causality.threshold_rule: binary fixture threshold crossing is conformance scaffolding only and cannot define hybrid or become the primary scientific metric by inheritance
continuous_joint_causality.interaction_diagnostic_status: optional later secondary diagnostic only; cannot be a requirement or replace the primary registered response

current_adapter_predicate: source_node_id belongs to the registered physical source-node set
surface digest has not already been consumed
admission_filter.typed_amount_guard: I06 may use a physical operation type only when independently causally justified; a contributor-unique immutable type or amount may not serve as a disguised arbitrary source label.
admission_filter.fixture_unique_route_status: adequate: common S1->P and S2->P are exact unique fixture edges; no unrelated traffic from registered S nodes targets common P
admission_filter.i06_route_rule: retain unique registered source-to-P routes or add one explicit physical role/channel key; arbitrary labels and packet/event/row digests cannot authorize causal admission

excluded_traffic.excluded_by: target is not P and source is not a registered S node
target is not P and source is not registered
target is not P and source is not registered
target is not P and source is not registered
common adapter target is P; private adapters have distinct target/configuration

admission_filter.exactly_once_rule: cursor scans only an unseen log suffix and consumed surface digests reject duplicate admission; these identities never enter R_H or V

neutral_contact.relative_position: after all P and H_P/M_H interventions and before feedback in every response branch
neutral_contact.latest_row_witness: every standard branch asserts feedback.source_surface_digest == neutral_trigger_digest
neutral_contact.branch_digest_rule: neutral row and feedback digests may differ across branches as audit identity; producer expected_source_surface_digest remains null
neutral_contact.absolute_schedule_qualification: branches with explicit debit or rematerialization reserve extra native slots, so absolute event/scheduler indices are not identical; admitted source proves they do not enter front_mass, polarity score, expected polarity, or threshold comparison, and every queue is empty before feedback
neutral_contact.i06_matching_rule: match neutral type/route/amount/final relative position/configuration and all scientifically relevant support/opportunity fields; if later timing itself is causal, exact event/proper-time matching or explicit stratification is required

mask_identity.native_dataflow: front_mass is the sum of live coherence for each declared front node; rear_mass is the corresponding live rear sum; no cached aggregate or lineage value enters
mask_identity.mask_order: semantic set/order registry is fixed; native addition is not a selector and a permutation may not add/remove/duplicate a node

P_only.chain: common contributions -> H_P admission -> M_H materialization -> native P->K_P debit -> common neutral contact -> same native V
P_only.evidence_relation: same H_P/M_H; different P; different native front_mass/joint score; no response under fixture threshold
P_only.admission_exclusion: P->K_P debit cannot satisfy source-in-registered-S and target-P predicate

H_only.chain: identical common contributions -> replace H_P -> recompute R_H -> native rematerialize M_H -> common neutral contact -> same native V
H_only.evidence_relation: same P; different H_P/M_H; different native front_mass/joint score; no response under fixture threshold

joint.construction: same native P contribution path plus same adapter H_P admission/materialization path used by component interventions; no special joint calculator
joint.evidence_scope: fixture shows both perturbations affect the same raw native score and binary response; it does not establish interaction or scientific necessity

guards: no reducer or dispatcher combines/selects private scores
no analysis result returns to runtime
B_ref is a fixed comparator and not an aggregation surface
common_private_binding.cross_pairing_effect: invalid identity; I06 registered restoration must reject P/H_P/M_H role or manifest cross-load before continuation

layered_hybrid_identity.identity_kind: package-layered composite identity; not a claim of one new native atomic API
layers: native restoration identity v2 including native current state and persisted reset baseline
adapter restoration identity including H_P tokens, cursor/idempotency, configuration/readout rule, last materialization/intervention, and reset baseline
joint experiment binding including P/H_P/M_H roles, common/private masks, one-sided-reset and implicit-rebase prohibitions
runtime freeze identity binding adapter/harness/source/environment hashes, token/admission profile, neutral contact, interventions, fixture topology, comparator, and run policy
paired save manifest binding native and adapter snapshot hashes plus pre-save composite identity
runtime evidence and reconstruction receipt binding freeze, evidence, reconstruction, invocation accounting, restoration witnesses, and graph guards
demonstrated: paired native/adapter snapshot save and internal artifact validation
paired native/adapter reset equals initial composite
fail_closed_rules: wrong P/H_P/M_H role or mask binding rejects identity
wrong adapter/native reset baseline rejects identity
stale M_H versus H_P rejects continuation
one-sided load/reset is not a governed continuation
different neutral/admission/fixture freeze rejects package identity

fixture_quarantine_registry.later_validator_action: I04 and I06 validators must recursively reject direct or trivially serialized reuse from every source artifact/pointer below; structural adapter code and pre-runtime causal fold family are the only reusable elements.
fixture_quarantine_registry.assertion_outcome_rule: 258/258 and every individual passed assertion are implementation-conformance provenance only and cannot be treated as a scientific control result or robustness estimate

retain unique physical source-to-P routes or explicit non-label/non-digest route/channel admission key and bound token type identity
register neutral-contact matching across all scientifically relevant timing/support/opportunity fields or explicit stratification
